g.text: GREEN = v1.0 stable — frozen API, semver guarantees
YELLOW = v0.x experimental — separate module, independent versioning
RED = integration submodules — opt-in, pinned to core
KEY CHANGE: agent/ and diagnose/ extracted from root module.
Root module shrinks to classification core only.
No experimental code in the v1.0 stable module.
